items.title_en: Create value for others and don’t worry about the returns
items.title_zh: 为他人创造价值，别过分担心回报
items.summary_en: A mindset shift that values creating real utility for others over chasing immediate financial returns. The piece urges builders to focus on impact, open collaboration, and sustainable practices rather than ROI alone.
items.summary_zh: 强调把为他人创造实用价值放在首位，而不是只追逐短期回报。文章倡导专注于影响力、开放协作和可持续做法，而非单纯看 ROI。

items.title_en: Tony Hoare has died
items.title_zh: 托尼·霍尔去世
items.summary_en: Renowned computer scientist Tony Hoare passed away, leaving a lasting legacy in formal methods, algorithm theory, and programming language design. His work, including Hoare logic and CSP, underpins modern verification, concurrency theory, and software correctness discussions.
items.summary_zh: 著名计算机科学家托尼·霍尔去世，正式方法、算法理论和编程语言设计方面的贡献深远。他提出的霍尔逻辑和 CSP 等奠定了现代形式化验证、并发理论与软件正确性讨论的基石。

items.title_en: Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes
items.title_zh: Zig 重构类型解析与语言特性的变更
items.summary_en: Zig's type resolution is undergoing a redesign, altering how the compiler infers and resolves types alongside accompanying language changes. The update affects compile times, error messages, and ergonomics for systems programming in Zig.
items.summary_zh: Zig 的类型解析将重新设计，改变编译器对类型的推断与解析方式，并伴随语言层面的变更。此升级影响编译速度、错误信息的呈现以及系统编程的开发体验。

items.title_en: U+237C ⍼ Is Azimuth
items.title_zh: U+237C ⍼ 是否为方位符号
items.summary_en: Debates the meaning of Unicode symbol U+237C ⍼, focusing on whether it represents an azimuth and how such obscure symbols are encoded and rendered. The discussion highlights typography and encoding edge cases that matter for map UI and font design.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Unicode 字符 U+237C ⍼ 是否代表方位符号，并关注边缘符号在编码与字体显示中的处理。内容涉及排版、符号分类，以及对地图界面和字体设计的实际影响。

items.title_en: Cloudflare crawl endpoint
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 新增抓取端点
items.summary_en: Cloudflare introduces a new crawl endpoint to help developers test and observe how Cloudflare's bot crawls their site. The endpoint aids debugging for SEO and understanding crawl behavior behind protections.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出新的抓取端点，帮助开发者测试并观察其爬虫对站点的抓取方式。此端点有助于 SEO 调试以及在保护机制下理解爬虫行为。

items.title_en: Universal vaccine against respiratory infections and allergens
items.title_zh: 针对呼吸道感染与过敏的通用疫苗取得进展
items.summary_en: The Stanford team reports a universal vaccine candidate that targets conserved elements across multiple respiratory pathogens and allergens, showing preclinical promise. If successful, it could reshape vaccination strategies and reduce a broad spectrum of illnesses.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福团队公布了针对多种呼吸道病原体和过敏原的通用疫苗候选，显示在保守区域的免疫靶点上具有前景。若成功，这种策略可能改变疫苗接种思路，降低多类疾病的风险。

items.title_en: Online age-verification tools for child safety are surveilling adults
items.title_zh: 面向儿童安全的线上年龄验证工具正在监控成年人
items.summary_en: Age-verification tools designed for child safety are collecting data on adults, creating surveillance for a broader audience. The piece argues for privacy-centric designs and stricter data governance to prevent abuse.
items.summary_zh: 为儿童安全而设计的在线年龄验证工具，正在对成年用户进行数据收集和监控，带来隐私风险。需要在设计和治理层面加强隐私保护，避免对成年人造成不必要的监控。

items.title_en: Agents that run while I sleep
items.title_zh: 睡梦中运行的智能代理
items.summary_en: The author prototypes autonomous, long-running agents that persist across sessions and wake on signals, illustrating challenges in reliability, state management, and safety when agents operate unattended.
items.summary_zh: 作者在原型中实现能跨会话持续运行、收到触发信号便自启动的自治代理，凸显无人值守运行下的可靠性、状态管理与安全性挑战。

items.title_en: After outages, Amazon to make senior engineers sign off on AI-assisted changes
items.title_zh: 故障后，亚马逊要求高级工程师对AI辅助变更签字批准
items.summary_en: Amazon introduces governance requiring senior engineers to approve AI-assisted changes before deployment after outages. This aims to improve safety, accountability, and rollback capabilities for critical systems in an AI-augmented ops environment.
items.summary_zh: 为加强关键系统的安全性和可追溯性，亚马逊宣布在故障后实施 AI 辅助变更需高级工程师签字批准的治理规则，确保可回滚与问责。

items.title_en: Meta acquires Moltbook
items.title_zh: Meta 收购 Moltbook
items.summary_en: Meta acquires Moltbook, likely to bolster its social networking slate around AI agents or analytics. The deal signals Meta's continued interest in agent-enabled social experiences.
items.summary_zh: Meta 收购 Moltbook，强化其在面向 AI 代理的社交网络与相关能力的布局。此举反映 Meta 对代理型社交体验的持续投入。

items.title_en: Writing my own text editor, and daily-driving it
items.title_zh: 写自己的文本编辑器，并日常使用它
items.summary_en: An unabashed write‑from‑scratch project: the author built a personal text editor and uses it daily, sharing lessons on tradeoffs, ergonomics, and the tension between minimalism and feature richness. It serves as a practical case study for tool design tailored to one’s own workflow.
items.summary_zh: 作者从零开始构建并每日使用自己的文本编辑器，分享对取舍、手感与极简主义与功能丰富性之间张力的思考。为定制化工作流下的工具设计提供了实用的案例研究。

items.title_en: RISC-V Is Sloooow
items.title_zh: RISC-V 真慢
items.summary_en: RISC-V performance and ecosystem maturity face scrutiny as real-world workloads lag behind established ISAs like x86 and ARM.
items.summary_zh: 在真实工作负载下，RISC-V 的性能与生态成熟度被质疑，与 x86/ARM 等成熟生态相比仍存在差距。文章聚焦工具链、编译器与硬件成熟度的不平衡对实际吞吐量和普及的影响。

items.title_en: Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions
items.title_zh: Debian 决定不就 AI 生成的贡献作出决定
items.summary_en: Debian delays policy on AI-generated contributions, leaving patch authorship and licensing rules unresolved. The move signals ongoing tension between openness, licensing, and automation in community-driven projects.
items.summary_zh: Debian 延迟就 AI 生成贡献的相关政策，尚未就署名、许可等规则定案。此举反映开源社区在开放性、许可与自动化之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: I put my whole life into a single database
items.title_zh: 将几乎人生放进一个数据库的个人故事，揭示隐私与数据控制的议题
items.summary_en: A personal story about consolidating nearly every aspect of life into one database and what that means for privacy, control, and data portability.
items.summary_zh: 将几乎人生放入一个数据库的个人故事，揭示隐私、控制权与数据可携带性等议题。

items.title_en: Launch HN: RunAnywhere (YC W26) – Faster AI Inference on Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Launch HN：RunAnwhere（YC W26）——在 Apple Silicon 上实现更快的 AI 推理
items.summary_en: RunAnwhere aims to speed up AI inference on Apple Silicon with an optimized runtime or toolchain, leveraging Metal/ML accelerators. This lowers latency and lets developers deploy larger models locally on Macs.
items.summary_zh: RunAnwhere 通过为 Apple Silicon 优化的推理运行时/工具链，提升本地 AI 推理速度，降低延迟。适合在 Mac 上本地部署更大模型，提升开发效率。

items.title_en: Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world
items.title_zh: Yann LeCun 筹集十亿美元打造理解物理世界的 AI
items.summary_en: Yann LeCun launches a billion-dollar fund to build AI systems that integrate perception, reasoning, and physical-world understanding. The effort signals a push toward grounding AI in real-world sensors and physics-based reasoning, with potential robotics implications.
items.summary_zh: Yann LeCun 领衔的十亿美元基金，目标打造具备感知、推理和物理世界理解能力的 AI 系统。该方向强调把 AI 与现实世界传感与物理规律结合，可能带来机器人等应用的突破。

items.title_en: FFmpeg-over-IP – Connect to remote FFmpeg servers
items.title_zh: FFmpeg-over-IP：远程连接 FFmpeg 服务器
items.summary_en: A tool enabling FFmpeg to connect to and orchestrate remote servers over IP, enabling distributed transcoding pipelines. It can simplify media workflows but introduces network latency and security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 一个工具使 FFmpeg 能通过 IP 连接并编排远程服务器，支持分布式转码工作流，简化媒体处理；同时需要关注网络延迟与安全性。

items.title_en: Redox OS has adopted a Certificate of Origin policy and a strict no-LLM policy
items.title_zh: Redox OS 采纳证书来源政策并严格执行不得使用大语言模型
items.summary_en: Redox OS now requires a Certificate of Origin for contributions and bans any use of large language models in development or contributions. The change tightens provenance and governance, reflecting rising concerns about licensing, data usage, and IP in open-source projects. It may influence how other community-driven systems manage safety, licensing and contributor trust.
items.summary_zh: Redox OS 现在要求贡献者提供证书原产地证明，并执行严格的不得使用大语言模型的规定。此举强化了贡献链的可追溯性与治理，反映出开源项目中对许可、数据使用与知识产权的日益关注。此政策或影响其他以社区为驱动的系统在安全、许可与贡献信任方面的做法。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo Review: No Other Budget Laptop Can Compete
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 评测：没有其他预算笔记本能匹敌
items.summary_en: Gizmodo’s take argues the MacBook Neo dominates the budget laptop segment, delivering efficiency, build quality, and battery life that rival pricier competitors. It reframes what ‘budget’ means in practice.
items.summary_zh: Gizmodo 的评测认为 MacBook Neo 在预算笔记本领域处于领先地位，凭借高效能、做工与续航等表现对标更贵的型号，重新定义了“预算”的含义。

items.title_en: HyperCard discovery: Neuromancer, Count Zero, Mona Lisa Overdrive (2022)
items.title_zh: HyperCard 发现：Neuromancer、Count Zero、Mona Lisa Overdrive（2022）
items.summary_en: A 2022 HyperCard discovery project uncovers artifacts linked to Gibson's cyberpunk trilogy, showing how retro platforms can host digital artifacts and spur preservation efforts that blend literature with early hypermedia.
items.summary_zh: 2022 年的 HyperCard 发现项目揭示了与吉布森赛博朋克三部曲相关的数字遗产，展示了复古平台承载数字藏品并推动早期超媒体保存的潜力。

items.title_en: Standardizing source maps
items.title_zh: 标准化源映射
items.summary_en: Standardizing how source maps are produced and consumed across toolchains would reduce debugging friction for minified and polyglot code. A common spec enables reliable source-level debugging across browsers and build systems.
items.summary_zh: 统一跨工具链的源映射生成与消费标准，将降低对混淆代码的调试困难。共享的规范可实现跨浏览器和构建系统的可靠源级调试。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Apple development certificate server seems down?
items.title_zh: 苹果开发者证书服务器宕机？
items.summary_en: Reports of an outage at Apple’s development certificate server affecting code signing and builds. The post shares glimpses of impact and practical workarounds for developers awaiting service restoration.
items.summary_zh: 报道显示苹果开发者证书服务器宕机，影响代码签名与构建。文中提供受影响开发者的影响概览及可用的临时应对策略。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo Is a 'Shock' to the PC Industry: Asus Co-CEO
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 将对 PC 行业造成‘冲击’：华硕联合首席执行官
items.summary_en: An Asus executive frame‑up framing the MacBook Neo as a disruptor to the PC market, signaling Apple’s ongoing impact on portable hardware. The remarks hint at shifts in design, performance, and ecosystem lock‑in.
items.summary_zh: 华硕高管将 MacBook Neo 描绘为对 PC 行业的颠覆性力量，显示 Apple 在便携硬件领域的持续影响。此言论预示设计、性能与生态体系绑定等方面的市场变化。

items.title_en: Gemma Needs Help
items.title_zh: Gemma 需要帮助
items.summary_en: A provocative LessWrong post centered on Gemma, a fictional AI agent, prompting discussion about alignment, governance, and the safeguards needed as AI capabilities grow.
items.summary_zh: 以虚构的 AI 代理 Gemma 为核心，促发关于对齐、治理与在能力提升时需要的安全机制的讨论。

items.title_en: I built a programming language using Claude Code
items.title_zh: 我用 Claude Code 构建了一门编程语言
items.summary_en: A hands-on experiment building a small programming language powered by Claude Code.
items.summary_zh: 尝试用 Claude Code 构建一门小型编程语言，分享在语言工具链中使用 Claude 的优劣、代码生成质量与潜在局限。

items.title_en: Billion-Parameter Theories
items.title_zh: 十亿参数理论
items.summary_en: Explores the viability and limits of billion-parameter AI models, including scaling laws, data requirements, and deployment trade-offs. Argues that even billion-parameter systems face fundamental gaps without broader world grounding.
items.summary_zh: 讨论亿参数级 AI 模型的可行性与局限，涵盖扩展规律、数据需求与部署取舍。指出仅靠大规模参数无法解决对现实世界的理解等根本问题。

items.title_en: We are building data breach machines and nobody cares
items.title_zh: 我们正在打造数据泄露机器，没人关心
items.summary_en: A provocative reflection on the creation of automated data-exfiltration tools and the lax attention to security risks. Advocates for more proactive defense work.
items.summary_zh: 对自动化数据泄露工具的开发及安全风险被忽视的现状进行尖锐反思，呼吁加强防守与合规意识。

items.title_en: Mesh over Bluetooth LE, TCP, or Reticulum
items.title_zh: Columba 的多传输网状网络：BLE、TCP 与 Reticulum
items.summary_en: Columba demonstrates mesh networking across multiple transport layers: Bluetooth LE, TCP, or Reticulum. The project emphasizes resilience, offline operation, and interoperability for IoT and distributed apps.
items.summary_zh: Columba 展示了一个可在蓝牙 LE、TCP 或 Reticulum 等多种传输层之上的网状网络。该项目强调韧性、离线运行和设备间互操作性，适用于物联网和分布式应用。

items.title_en: Mother of All Grease Fires (1994)
items.title_zh: 油脂火灾之母（1994）
items.summary_en: Revisits a notorious grease-fire incident from 1994, offering a historical curiosity about safety culture and the era’s tech-adjacent storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 1994 年著名的油脂火灾事件，提供关于安全文化与当时技术叙事的历史趣闻。

items.title_en: Levels of Agentic Engineering
items.title_zh: 代理性工程的等级划分
items.summary_en: A taxonomy of agentic engineering levels, clarifying what degree of autonomy or initiative AI systems should have in different contexts.
items.summary_zh: 对代理性工程的等级进行分层，阐明不同场景下 AI 系统应具备的自治与主动性程度。

items.title_en: PgAdmin 4 9.13 with AI Assistant Panel
items.title_zh: PgAdmin 4 9.13：新增 AI 助手面板
items.summary_en: PgAdmin 4.9.13 adds an AI Assistant panel to help generate SQL, optimize queries, or suggest visualizations inside the query tool. It signals a broader trend of embedding AI copilots in developer IDEs and database tools to boost productivity.
items.summary_zh: PgAdmin 4.9.13 新增 AI 助手面板，帮助生成和优化 SQL，并可给出可视化建议。反映了开发工具嵌入 AI 助手的趋势，提升数据库工作流效率。

items.title_en: SSH Secret Menu
items.title_zh: SSH 秘密菜单
items.summary_en: An exploration of an SSH 'secret menu', a hidden interface for quick commands or configuration access. It highlights productivity tricks while flagging security considerations when exposing or sharing such features.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个 SSH 的“秘密菜单”概念，即隐藏界面用于快速执行命令或切换配置。强调提高效率的同时，也需关注将此类特性暴露给他人时的安全性。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Didit (YC W26) – Stripe for Identity Verification
items.title_zh: Didit（YC W26）——身份验证服务的 Stripe 式模式
items.summary_en: Didit offers identity verification as a service with a Stripe-like model, focusing on a simple integration and pricing based on verifications.
items.summary_zh: Didit 提供身份验证即服务，采用类似 Stripe 的计费与简易集成的 API，旨在降低用户注册过程的摩擦。

items.title_en: Defeat as Method
items.title_zh: 失败作为方法
items.summary_en: A philosophical piece arguing that embracing defeat or failure can inform robust design and strategy. Offers a counterpoint to triumphalist thinking in engineering.
items.summary_zh: 一篇哲学性文章主张将失败视为方法论的一部分，以此引导更坚韧的设计与策略；对工程中的胜利至上思维提出质疑。

items.title_en: The Unmaking of the American University
items.title_zh: 美国大学的解体
items.summary_en: An examination of how American universities are undergoing structural changes under funding pressures and marketization.
items.summary_zh: 分析美国高校在资金压力和市场化压力下的结构性变革，探讨对研究、教育公平和科技人才培养生态的影响。

items.title_en: TADA: Fast, Reliable Speech Generation Through Text-Acoustic Synchronization
items.title_zh: TADA：通过文本-声学同步实现快速且可靠的语音生成
items.summary_en: TADA is an open‑source speech generation approach that uses text‑acoustic synchronization to produce fast, natural voices. This technique enables high‑quality TTS suitable for dynamic content and realistic lip-sync applications.
items.summary_zh: TADA 是一个开源的语音生成方法，利用文本与声学的同步实现更快且更自然的语音输出。该技术适用于动态内容和更真实的口型对齐场景的高质量 TTS。

items.title_en: Open Weights isn't Open Training
items.title_zh: Open Weights 不是 Open Training
items.summary_en: The piece argues that Open Weights project doesn't equate to open training, raising questions about licensing, data provenance, and transparency in open weight ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出 Open Weights 不等同于 Open Training，探讨在开源权重生态中许可、数据来源与透明度等问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: What's my JND? – a colour guessing game
items.title_zh: Show HN：我的感知阈值是什么？——颜色猜测游戏
items.summary_en: A browser-based color-guessing game that challenges users to identify perceptual color differences, illustrating perceptual limits and color spaces. It’s a playful way to explore JND concepts and display calibration.
items.summary_zh: 一个基于浏览器的颜色猜测游戏，挑战用户识别感知中的颜色差异，展示感知极限与颜色空间。是探索最小可觉差（JND）与显示校准的有趣方式。

items.title_en: EQT eyes potential $6B sale of Linux pioneer SUSE, sources say
items.title_zh: EQT 考虑以约60亿美元出售 Linux 先驱 SUSE
items.summary_en: EQT is reportedly exploring a potential sale of SUSE for around $6B, signaling a significant strategic move for the company and the Linux ecosystem. A sale could reshape enterprise Linux dynamics and influence open‑source governance and investment.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，EQT 正在考虑以大约60亿美元出售 SUSE，这对公司及 Linux 生态系统意味着重要的战略动作。交易可能重塑企业级 Linux 的格局并影响开源治理与投资方向。

items.title_en: Roblox is minting teen millionaires
items.title_zh: Roblox 让青少年成为百万富翁
items.summary_en: Roblox's creator economy continues to generate teen millionaires as developers monetize popular games and experiences.
items.summary_zh: Roblox 的创作者经济让不少青少年成为百万富翁，开发者通过热门游戏与体验实现可观收入。文章分析平台经济、分成机制及对游戏行业与青少年创业的影响。

items.title_en: Invoker Commands API
items.title_zh: Invoker Commands API
items.summary_en: The Invoker Commands API proposes a standard way for web apps to request invoking OS or other apps via commands, enabling deeper integration but requiring careful security and permission modeling to avoid abuse.
items.summary_zh: Invoker Commands API 提出一种网页应用通过命令请求调用操作系统或其他应用的标准化方式，带来更深层的集成，但需谨慎设计安全与权限模型以防滥用。

items.title_en: Exploring the ocean with Raspberry Pi–powered marine robots
items.title_zh: 用树莓派驱动的海洋机器人探索海洋
items.summary_en: Raspberry Pi-powered marine robots are used to explore underwater environments, leveraging affordable sensors and open-source software. This showcases how accessible hardware can contribute to oceanography and education.
items.summary_zh: 树莓派驱动的海洋机器人用于探测海洋环境，结合低成本传感器与开源软件，展示了入门级硬件在海洋研究与教育中的潜力。

items.title_en: I used pulsar detection techniques to turn a phone into a watch timegrapher
items.title_zh: 我用脉冲星探测技术把手机变成手表走时检测仪
items.summary_en: Using pulsar detection techniques, the author turns a smartphone into a watch timing instrument, enabling affordable timekeeping analysis. Demonstrates crossover between radio astronomy methods and consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: 通过脉冲星探测方法将手机变为手表走时检测仪，展示了无线天文技术对消费设备的跨界应用。

items.title_en: Julia Snail – An Emacs Development Environment for Julia Like Clojure's Cider
items.title_zh: Julia Snail——为 Julia 提供的 Emacs 开发环境，类似 Clojure 的 Cider
items.summary_en: Julia Snail integrates Julia with Emacs to deliver an interactive, REPL-driven development workflow similar to Cider for Clojure. It brings enhanced tooling, inline docs, and a more ergonomic path for Julia developers.
items.summary_zh: Julia Snail 将 Julia 与 Emacs 结合，提供类似 Cider 的交互式开发工作流。它带来改进的工具链、内联文档以及更高效的 Julia 开发体验。

items.title_en: Because Algospeak
items.title_zh: 因为 algospeak（算法语言）
items.summary_en: An exploration of algospeak—the language people use to describe algorithmic systems and online ranking—and how terminology shapes policy debates and user understanding of platforms.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 algospeak（算法语言）这一描述算法系统与在线排序的语言如何影响政策讨论与用户对平台推荐机制的理解。

items.title_en: Bippy: React Internals Toolkit
items.title_zh: Bippy：React 内部工具箱
items.summary_en: Bippy offers a toolkit for inspecting and understanding React internals, including the Fiber architecture and rendering lifecycle. It helps developers reason about performance limits beyond conventional APIs.
items.summary_zh: Bippy 提供一套用于分析与理解 React 内部的工具集，涵盖 Fiber 架构与渲染生命周期，帮助开发者超越表层 API 来评估性能。

items.title_en: Traditional tales from Cornwall, with maps for stories' locations
items.title_zh: 康沃尔传统故事及其故事地点地图
items.summary_en: A digital humanities project collecting Cornwall’s traditional tales and mapping the geographical locations tied to each story. It offers a rich, interactive resource for folklore enthusiasts and educators.
items.summary_zh: 一个数字人文项目，收集康沃尔的传统故事并将故事发生地点用地图标注，面向民俗爱好者和教育者提供互动资源。

items.title_en: Pike: To Exit or Not to Exit
items.title_zh: Pike：退出还是继续押注下一轮退出
items.summary_en: A decision framework for startups that weighs whether to exit now or gamble on the next milestone. The piece outlines a probabilistic approach to balancing risk, timing, and potential upside.
items.summary_zh: 提供一个创业决策框架，帮助权衡是现在退出还是继续押注下一轮退出。文章用概率方法平衡风险、时机和潜在收益。

items.title_en: Show HN: Safelaunch – Validates your environment before you push to production
items.title_zh: Show HN: Safelaunch——在你推送生产环境前校验环境
items.summary_en: Safelaunch validates your deployment environment before pushing to production, catching misconfigurations and drift early. It’s a practical safeguard for teams aiming to reduce post‑deploy incidents.
items.summary_zh: Safelaunch 在推送生产环境前对部署环境进行校验，及早发现配置错误与漂移。对希望降低上线后故障的团队来说，是一项实用的防护工具。

items.title_en: Support for Aquantia AQC113 and AQC113C Ethernet Controllers on FreeBSD
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 对 Aquantia AQC113/AQC113C 以太网控制器的支持
items.summary_en: FreeBSD gains driver support for Aquantia AQC113 and AQC113C Ethernet controllers, expanding hardware compatibility. The update improves performance and reliability for users deploying these NICs in servers and desktops.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 增强了对 Aquantia AQC113/AQC113C 以太网控制器的驱动支持，提升了这类网卡在服务器与桌面环境中的性能与稳定性。
